title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Vikram Hitlist
subTitle: The police launch a black-ops operation against a mysterious masked vigilante and his team, whose mission is to free society from a dangerous drug epidemic.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Marzi The Power
subTitle: Krishnaveni runs away from home to elope with her lover, Kishore, who does not show up. Gani, a self-centred man, plans to take her to her father, hoping to make a quick buck.

title: The Return of Abhimanyu
subTitle: A soldier takes on a gang of cyber criminals when money goes missing from his account.

title: Seetharamam
subTitle: A woman from Pakistan, Afreen, finds her life forever altered when she travels to India to fulfil her grandfather's dying wish of delivering a love letter written back in 1965.

title: Zombie Reddy
subTitle: Mario, a game developer, and his friends, get caught up in the rivalry between two families and a mysterious zombie attack in Rayalaseema where they go to attend a friend's wedding.

title: Khatarnak Policewala
subTitle: An Assistant Commissioner of Police (Arun Vijay) investigates the murder of a Church Father and a woman's disappearance.

title: Geetanjali 2
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, him and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Taqdeer
subTitle: Avinash manages to get the phone number of his childhood love Priya, but his phone gets stolen by a gangster. He sets out on a dangerous chase in order to reconcile with his lover.

title: Khaidi No. 150
subTitle: After escaping from prison, a criminal flees the country. Having spent his entire life on the wrong side of the law, he is suddenly move by the plight of farmers he meets there and fights for their cause.

title: Khaidi No. 150
subTitle: After escaping from prison, a criminal flees the country. Having spent his entire life on the wrong side of the law, he is suddenly move by the plight of farmers he meets there and fights for their cause.

title: Gangs of Godavari
subTitle: A man journeys from rags to riches with absolute grit and determination in the Eluru and Godavari coastal regions of India.

title: Doshi
subTitle: A man's life falls into danger when he accidentally takes a photo of a murder committed by a gangster. The latter then kidnaps his lover in exchange for the evidence.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Robinson, his older cousin José, and his friend Ornella, desperately search for his sister Santa, who has been kidnapped by a human trafficking ring in a remote town in Buenos Aires.

title: International Khiladi
subTitle: An international crime boss and his journalist girlfriend fall victim to an elaborate conspiracy that claims an innocent life and turns them into bitter enemies.

title: Run Baby Run
subTitle: Two people in a relationship have professional conflicts.

title: Ugram
subTitle: Inspector Shiva Kumar is an impetuous policeman, which often gets him into trouble at work and at home. However, the consequences of his actions are starting to catch up with him.

title: Hidimbha
subTitle: In Hyderabad, two police officers begin to investigate a case, but more people go missing in the process. All the victims are girls, with one other interesting commonality.

title: Kaduva
subTitle: A young rubber farmer in Kottayam, India, becomes bitter rivals with a local police officer.

title: Tiger Nageswara Rao
subTitle: During the 1970s, thief Tiger Nageswara Rao masterminds a series of daring heists and becomes a legend for his ingenious methods of outwitting the police.

title: Inttelligent
subTitle: A software engineer comes to the rescue of his employer when his competitors use corrupt means to destroy their business and reputation.

title: Ghudchadi
subTitle: Chirag and Devika fall in love with each other and plan to get married. However, trouble ensues when they realise Chirag's father and Devika's mother were former lovers.

title: Jaane Bhi Do Yaaro
subTitle: Two photographers experience the deadly side of Bombay real estate when they stumble upon a murder.
